pageName: TiDB: The Database for Production AI

meta.title: TiDB: The Database for Production AI
meta.description: Build production AI with TiDB—unified platform for retrieval, stateful agents, and live data at scale.

props.headline: The Database for Production AI
props.subheadline: From grounded retrieval to stateful agents, TiDB unifies the foundation for production AI applications with live data, consistent state, and real-time scale

props.title: The Unified Data Platform for AI-Native Systems
props.subtitle: A single architecture that brings transactional, analytical, and AI workloads together—enabling retrieval, stateful agents, and reasoning without fragmented systems.

items.title: Precise Retrieval with Continuously Current Context
items.description: Enable semantic search and RAG experiences that reflect the latest state of your data—without stale indexes or delayed pipelines.

items.title: Durable State for Autonomous and Multi-Step Reasoning Agents
items.description: Persist conversations, tool interactions, and workflow progress with consistency designed for long-running and concurrent AI behavior.

items.title: Intelligence Across Operational and Analytical Data
items.description: Allow AI to reason across transactions and analytics together, eliminating complex synchronization between systems.

items.title: Distributed Architecture That Scales with AI Demand
items.description: Support growth across users, agents, sessions, and environments with built-in concurrency, isolation, and horizontal expansion.

props.title: Support the Architectures Teams Rely On
props.subtitle: From retrieval-driven experiences to autonomous agent systems, TiDB supports the architectures teams rely on to rapidly build and operate AI at scale.

items.title: Search, Retrieval, and RAG
items.description: Build accurate, context-aware AI experiences using semantic search, hybrid queries, and continuously fresh data.

items.title: Stateful Agents and Autonomous Workflows
items.description: Build Agents that maintain memory, coordinate tools, and operate reliably across complex, multi-step processes.

items.quote: We consolidated our entire AI backend into TiDB—letting our engineers focus on building agent features instead of managing database complexity.
items.author: AI Engineering Team

items.quote: TiDB’s elastic architecture enabled us to migrate in two weeks, supporting users and massive ‘Context Engineering’ workloads for viral success.
items.author: Engineering Leader

props.title: Start Building with TiDB
props.subtitle: Deploy AI on a trusted data platform in minutes, or connect with our team to design systems tailored to your application.
